infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Allow Walkie-Talkie to sync your calendar events to the server.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: Allow Walkie-Talkie to sync your reminders to the server.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Allow Walkie-Talkie to show your friends and sync contacts.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Walkie-Talkie to capture photos for profile and chats.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow Walkie-Talkie to record voice messages for chats.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow Walkie-Talkie to track your current coordinates for safety location syncing.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Walkie-Talkie to choose and save media files.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Walkie-Talkie to back up your photos.
